headline: SIGNAL SCAN — May 12
telegramText: SIGNAL SCAN — May 12, 2026 SNAPSHOT Risk-on tone dominates with semiconductors and metals leading while volatility spikes create cross-currents. IMPLICATION Cyclical leadership in semiconductors and copper miners suggests reflationary positioning while healthcare and communication services lag. Volatility spike amid equity strength indicates cautious optimism. Focus on momentum in industrial metals and chip names while monitoring defensive sector weakness for broader risk sentiment shifts. agentcanary.ai | Not financial advice
